creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks, committed!  Interestingly enough, the installation/packaging 
didn't really "fail" -- it printed out some messages and went through! 
That's hard to debug.... 

By the way, you also changed "news.news" to "news:news" which is fine, 
but you somehow made a diff from a "news:news" line that had me scratching 
my head for awhile.  (My eyes are not trained for distinguishing between 
"." and ":"!)  Next time please start with a version we have in the tree, 
thanks!
